description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a buttoned, collared shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows, paired with fitted trousers and a belt. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and mustache, and short, well-kept hair. His facial expression is neutral, and his arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, with fingers extended naturally. The shirt is tucked into the trousers, which are straight-cut and end at the ankles, revealing classic dress shoes. The overall appearance suggests a casual yet professional urban style, suitable for city streets or office environments. The figure's proportions and posture are realistic, with attention to anatomical detail and clothing folds.
description: A bearded adult male in a collared shirt, rolled sleeves, fitted trousers, and dress shoes, standing in a relaxed pose. The style is casual-professional and urban.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, collared shirt with buttons, rolled sleeves, belt, and straight trousers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the rolled sleeve, and the side seam of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, belt, and trousers, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible shirt and trouser details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted trousers, and a belt
